title: Chapter 41
content:
Chapter 41

"Chaa!!!"

Slice...

Thud...

[You have killed a goblin]

[You have gained 100 EXP]

[You have gained an E mana crystal]

[You have gained 100 SC]

"..."

The way everyone looked at me was strange. I had simply used a sword swing to kill a monster; they were taking hours to fight, so why were they looking at me like I was the strange one?

They were the ones with two two-star aura warriors, two one-star aura warriors, and a second circle mage. Yet, they were having trouble facing a goblin the size of their youngest family member and with a strength that hardly surpassed a human adult male.

"From now on, we are going to learn proper weapon techniques," I said once I stored the body of the goblin in my inventory without going through the trouble of skinning and ripping it apart.

I simply told them it was a spell I discovered on my own, and they had no other choice but to believe me, given the fact that it helped them. A lot.

After all, I was holding almost all of our luggage for the month.

With that out of the way, I began to teach them proper sword stances and paths to fight. I also taught them the basic strategies they needed to master. For example, an archer should only wield a dagger when they were out of arrows and there was no other choice left.

Sandra would switch to a dagger and close battle whenever she needed to surround the monster to keep it from running away, when she could have easily just created some distance and finished it with an arrow.

Another problem they all faced was that they knew how to empower their bodies slightly with aura, but they didn't know how to properly wield it on their weapons. I didn't know if it was the same case for every resident of this world, but it was so for these guys at the very least.

So, the first thing that came as a priority was...

"You will do these exercises every day for the next month and..." I instructed them to do some basic exercises but at a very difficult intensity, even to Rayla, and gave them an aura and mana cultivation technique to both categories.

I told them it was a gift from the lord and I was sharing it with the family. The parents were hesitant to feast on their son's achievement like this, but the siblings were happy.

I convinced them to agree as well. As for how I obtained an aura cultivation technique. Well, I made up a bullshit lie that mana and aura were not difficult so after studying the book, I created these techniques which was technically the truth except for the part these weren't the books given by the lord.

These were the highest rank aura and mana cultivation techniques I learned in one of my previous worlds. It held information after a lot of centuries of my and many more people's research.

The attraction rate for aura and mana multiplied was by at the very least 100%, so even if they were talentless beyond the point of saving, they would at the very least reach the fifth circle and fifth star in about four to five years.

They could even reach the pinnacle in a few decades if they were lucky, and that was given if they were not talented. If they were talented, however, then in a few short years, a decade at most, they would stand at the top of this world.

Given that they worked hard and had the talent to back it up.

Anyway, enough with all of this. After an entire day of training, it finally began to get dark, and other than hunting the monsters that came to us on their own, which were taken care of by me, we did nothing else but focus on the family's training. The physical training was useless for me, so I only assisted them today.

Unfortunately, I had to give up on today's dick action because the things were so hectic today, but I made sure to have my fun tomorrow. Once everyone was asleep and safe and sound, I began to search the forest with an enchanted sword in my hand.

I had placed a protective shield around the sleeping family that I purchased from the shop at the cost of a whopping 10,000 coins, but it was necessary to do so. They were out for the good, and I needed to hunt the whole night to make up for my plans.

Goblins.

Wolves.

Boars.

Bears.

Monkeys.

Rabbits.

Squirrels.

No matter what came before me, I killed them without mercy. For some reason, even though I had reached the 50 level threshold, I was still gaining EXP from the F and E rank monsters, which was strange for me as the system had never done so before.

Still, who was I to complain?

After an entire night of hunting and only returning at dawn to find a crowd of monsters outside the shield, which was soundproof as well, so the family wasn't up even when there were hundreds of monsters around them, growling and snarling, I began to kill the monsters around me.

In a mere five minutes, every single monster was dead, and their bodies were safe and sound, stored in my inventory.

I sighed and looked at the sun. It was still about two hours from sundown down and like a military instructor, I should have woken them up to train, but before that, there was something I needed to do.

[You have killed an F rank monster x3019]

[You have gained an F rank mana crystal x3019]

[You have gained EXP 30190]

[You have gained SC 30190]

[You have killed an E rank monster x710]

[You have gained an E rank mana crystal x 710]

[You have gained EXP 71000]

[You have gained SC 71000]

[You have killed a D rank monster x4]

[You have gained a D rank mana crystal x4]

[You have gained EXP x4000]

[You have gained SC 4000]

The amount of D rank monsters in this forest was pitifully low, considering it was still the outer realm and there weren't many threats in this area. Still, the hunt was smooth and gained a shit ton of EXP and shop coins to proceed my further plans.

Not to mention...

[You have leveled up x17]

[You have obtained 85 stat points]

[EXP 1904\7200]

I couldn't help but smile at the fact that even after wiping out the outer area of the forest, I had managed to level up so much that I could only wonder how much I would obtain once I entered the deeper areas. There was still a chance there were lower-level monsters in this area, and I would have to look for them tomorrow as well, but for now, it was time to focus on what I had to do.

[Intelligence 115]

[Bonus stat points 102]

Dumping all the stat points in my Intelligence was not a good idea, but I had no other choice at the moment. If I wanted to keep the state active for most of the time, then...

[95 points added to Intelligence]

[MP: 2100]

I felt the usual rush of the mana as it filled my body. It wasn't like the advent of the physical prowess that was a little painful as well, along with the usual energize, but it was more like a gentle warm soothing that urged one to sleep, and resisting that urge was what was painful.

"Haa..." I let out a deep breath as I filled my lungs with the morning air. Once done, I left the seven stat points as they were and focused on the current task at hand. No sound could enter the barrier, and they were still fast asleep, so...

"Mother," I whispered gently, but Rayla didn't even move, let alone wake up. I sighed and moved on to Sandra. Rayla, being a mage, was too tired to help out with anything, let alone have a taxing task such as sex. Granted, I could feed her a stamina potion, but I was too backed up to care.

I approached Sandra, who was sleeping soundly, and whispered her name while shaking her a bit, "Sandra."

She woke up on the first call and looked at me with a little sleep left in her eyes as she asked, "What is it, Jack?"

"I need your help," I whispered again.

"With what?" Sandra asked.

"With my tail," I said, even softly than before.

That for sure got her attention as her eyes suddenly opened wide, and she sat down, looking around. Seeing that everyone was asleep and it was still dark, she sighed and turned to look at me with a stern expression, whispering, "How many times do I have to tell you not to mention it, huh?"

I nodded apologetically, and she sighed. She stood up and said, "Come on, we have to go away from here before we do anything."

I nodded and took her out of the barrier, which was transparent, so she didn't even know she passed through it. As we made our way away from the family deeper into the forest, I could only gulp looking at her ass that was normal as usual but all the more enticing today.

I couldn't wait to get started.

~~

Let me know if there are any errors.
